info.title: Permission API
info.description: API for managing permissions with JWT Authentication

400.description: Invalid data or email already exists

get.summary: Gets all groups with their permission counts

200.description: Returns the list of groups with permission counts

get.summary: Gets a specific group by ID
Gets all permissions assigned to a group

post.summary: Assigns a permission to a group

400.description: Invalid input or permission already assigned

delete.summary: Removes a permission from a group

404.description: Group, permission, or association not found

put.summary: Syncs permissions for a group (replaces all existing permissions)

requestBody.description: List of permission IDs to assign

get.summary: Gets a specific permission by ID
Gets a specific user by ID
Gets all permissions for a specific user

parameters.name: useLinq
parameters.description: Optional: use LINQ implementation instead of stored procedure (default: false)

200.description: Returns the list of user permissions

post.summary: Assigns a direct permission to a user

400.description: Invalid input or permission already assigned

get.summary: Gets all groups a user belongs to

post.summary: Assigns a user to a group

400.description: Invalid input or user already in group

delete.summary: Removes a user from a group

404.description: User, group, or association not found

get.summary: Gets only direct permissions for a user (not group-based)

200.description: Returns the list of direct permissions

delete.summary: Removes a direct permission from a user

404.description: User, permission, or association not found

post.summary: Assigns multiple groups and direct permissions to a user in a single operation

put.summary: Syncs user's groups and direct permissions (replaces entire lists)

requestBody.description: Sync data containing desired groups and permissions

get.summary: Gets a list of weather forecasts

AssignPermissionToGroupDto.description: DTO for assigning a permission to a group

AssignPermissionToUserDto.description: DTO for assigning a direct permission to a user

groupIds.description: List of group IDs to assign to the user

directPermissionIds.description: List of permission IDs to assign directly to the user

AssignUserRolesDto.description: DTO for assigning groups and direct permissions to a user in a single request

AssignUserToGroupDto.description: DTO for assigning a user to a group

permissionsAssigned.description: Number of direct permissions successfully assigned

success.description: Indicates if the operation was completely successful

permissionIds.description: List of permission IDs to assign to the group

BulkAssignPermissionsToGroupDto.description: Bulk assignment of permissions to a group (replaces existing permissions)

permissionsUnchanged.description: Number of permissions that were already assigned (unchanged)

invalidPermissionIds.description: Permission IDs that were not found

finalPermissionIds.description: Final list of permission IDs assigned to the group

success.description: Indicates if the operation was completely successful

BulkAssignmentResult.description: Result of bulk permission assignment operation

isActive.description: Indicates if the group is active (default: true)

CreateGroupDto.description: DTO for creating a new group

isActive.description: Indicates if the permission is active (default: true)

CreatePermissionDto.description: DTO for creating a new permission

isActive.description: Indicates if the group is active
Indicates if the group is active

permissionCount.description: Number of permissions assigned to this group

GroupWithPermissionCountDto.description: Data transfer object for group with permission count

refreshToken.description: Refresh token for obtaining new access tokens

LoginResponseDto.description: Login response with tokens and user information

isActive.description: Indicates if the permission is active

PermissionDetailDto.description: Detailed data transfer object for permission

groupName.description: Group name (if permission is from a group, null if direct permission)

PermissionDto.description: Data transfer object for user permission

RefreshTokenRequestDto.description: Request to refresh an access token

groupIds.description: List of group IDs the user should belong to (replaces existing)

permissionIds.description: List of permission IDs to assign directly to the user (replaces existing)

SyncUserRolesDto.description: DTO for syncing user's groups and direct permissions (sync/replace operation)

isActive.description: Indicates if the group is active

UpdateGroupDto.description: DTO for updating an existing group

isActive.description: Indicates if the permission is active

UpdatePermissionDto.description: DTO for updating an existing permission

invalidGroupIds.description: Invalid group IDs that don't exist

finalGroupIds.description: Final list of valid group IDs after sync

invalidPermissionIds.description: Invalid permission IDs that don't exist

finalPermissionIds.description: Final list of valid permission IDs after sync

success.description: Indicates if the operation was completely successful (no invalid IDs)

UserRolesSyncResult.description: Result of user roles sync operation (groups and direct permissions)

Bearer.description:
Enter 'Bearer' [space] and then your token in the text input below.

Example: "Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..."
